test_title: click beacon se envía al hacer click en el botón View More
suite_title: Pause Ad VAST — Beacons de tracking
error_message:
expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)

Expected: >= 1
Received:    0

Call Log:
- Timeout 10000ms exceeded while waiting on the predicate
root_cause: The test waits for button.pause-ad__more-info to appear before clicking it to fire the click beacon. Since the PauseAd component does not exist in the develop player build, the button never renders and the poll times out before the click or beacon assertion is reached.
suspected_cause: Cascading failure: depends on overlay rendering (same blocked by missing feature branch deploy) before the click interaction.
